clusters.justification: These terms map onto cortico-subcortical circuitry, including the amygdala and anterior insula, dedicated to processing valenced arousal and regulating generalized emotional states.
These concepts share co-activation profiles across cortico-striatal pathways involved in computing subjective worth, processing incentives, and driving goal-directed behavioral selection.
This cluster reflects the overarching cognitive architecture supported by the default mode network to internally model representations of the self, personal narratives, and the minds of others.
